title: Arbitraging the global trademark treaty system
abstract: Arbitraging the global trademark treaty system transforms static documents into an interactive Q&A system. It supports PDFs, websites, and codebases, with full source attribution on every answer. U...
abstract_zh: 这个工具就像是商标条约系统里的“股市淘金者”，它能将冷冰冰的文档变成互动问答，让你像玩游戏一样穿梭于PDF、网站和代码之间。每答一题都有出处，就像翻阅了一本活的法律百科全书！
